key_predictive_features: fear_greed: 91.3% accuracy (287 sam) — best single signal for silver

fundamental_drivers: Gold-silver ratio: was 90, now compressed to ~62. Thesis: further compression to 50.
Industrial demand: solar panel installations accelerating (IEA 2026 projections)
Central bank buying: record pace continued through Q1 2026
Supply deficit: mine output declining, recycling insufficient
Geopolitical premium: Middle East, Ukraine conflicts ongoing

cross_asset_correlations.gold: Primary driver. XAU at $4,750 — all-time high territory. XAG follows with leverage.
cross_asset_correlations.DXY: Inverse correlation. Weak USD = strong silver. DXY strength would hurt thesis.
cross_asset_correlations.real_yields: Inverse. Rising real yields compress precious metals. Fed policy critical.
cross_asset_correlations.copper: Industrial demand proxy. Copper strength confirms industrial thesis for silver.

seasonal_patterns: Silver typically strong in Q2 (Indian wedding season demand)
Mining supply seasonal lull in Q1 carries into Q2
